violations.text: Insufficient lighting observed in the lower level kitchen area. Establishment shall replace bulbs. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025

The ceiling in the downstairs kitchen, main food prep area, and ceiling in the upstairs bar area are covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. -Ceiling shall be replaced. -In addition, the floor in the upstairs bar area is not smooth, durable, non-absorbent, or easily cleanable. Floor shall be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

Lighting in the downstairs kitchen observed inadequate. Lighting 6-303.11 Intensity. The light intensity shall be: (A) At least 108 lux (10 foot candles) at a distance of 75 cm (30 inches) above the floor, in walk-in refrigeration units and dry FOOD storage areas and in other areas and rooms during periods of cleaning. -Brighter lights shall be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025
